diagnoses.name: Schizophrenia, unspecified
diagnoses.evidence_span: longstanding diagnosis of schizophrenia, unspecified, which has been difficult to manage pharmacologically during periods of substance use

diagnoses.name: Cocaine use disorder, uncomplicated
diagnoses.evidence_span: recent cocaine use and continued alcohol consumption

diagnoses.name: Alcohol use disorder with alcohol-induced disorder
diagnoses.evidence_span: ongoing struggles with alcohol use disorder with an unspecified alcohol-induced disorder

diagnoses.name: Psychoactive substance-induced mood disorder
diagnoses.evidence_span: psychoactive substance-induced mood disorder has created an acute crisis requiring hospitalization

diagnoses.name: HIV disease
diagnoses.evidence_span: HIV disease on prior antiretroviral therapy

diagnoses.name: Chronic viral hepatitis C without hepatic coma
diagnoses.evidence_span: chronic viral hepatitis C without hepatic coma

diagnoses.name: History of traumatic brain injury
diagnoses.evidence_span: remote history of traumatic brain injury

diagnoses.name: Paranoid ideation
diagnoses.evidence_span: He reports feeling hopeless, paranoid, and experiencing auditory hallucinations

procedures.name: Psychiatric evaluation
procedures.evidence_span: The pt was initiated on a structured psychiatric evaluation and medical assessment

procedures.name: Mental status exam
procedures.evidence_span: Mental status exam revealed disorganized speech, paranoid ideation, and auditory hallucinations

procedures.name: CD4 count measurement
procedures.evidence_span: Labs on admission showed CD4 count of 285 cells/mm³

procedures.name: Hepatic function panel
procedures.evidence_span: Hepatic function panel was notable for elevated transaminases consistent with chronic hepatitis C

procedures.name: Medication reconciliation
procedures.evidence_span: A comprehensive medication reconciliation has been completed

medications.name: Quetiapine fumarate
medications.evidence_span: He will continue quetiapine fumarate for antipsychotic coverage at doses ranging from 25 mg to 300 mg for titration flexibility

medications.name: Sertraline
medications.evidence_span: sertraline 25 mg daily for mood support

medications.name: Hydroxyzine
medications.evidence_span: hydroxyzine 50 mg as needed for anxiety

medications.name: Thiamine
medications.evidence_span: He is prescribed thiamine 100 mg daily

medications.name: Folic acid
medications.evidence_span: folic acid 1 mg daily for nutritional supplementation

medications.name: Sulfamethoxazole-trimethoprim DS
medications.evidence_span: Sulfamethoxazole-trimethoprim DS is continued for PCP prophylaxis given his CD4 count below 200

chief_complaint: Acute psychiatric decompensation in the setting of polysubstance use
